case_title: FOTINOS, JOHN T. VS SHAPIRO, BARBARA A.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, BARBARA A.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY FOTINOS, JOHN T. AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, BARBARA A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOTINOS, JOHN T. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, BARBARA A. $750.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $796.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, BARBARA A.
